title: helianthemum eriocephalum
intro: Helianthemum eriocephalum, also known as Rockrose or Frostweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cistaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and combat infections. The health benefits of Helianthemum eriocephalum include its ability to promote skin health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system, making it a popular natural remedy for various health conditions. Helianthemum eriocephalum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of herbal preparations.
